description: Starbucks is a global coffeehouse company and consumer brand. Its public web presence mainly serves customers, careers, and internal/partner access, with no broadly documented public developer API portal I could confirm.
summary: starbucks.com exposes no general public developer platform that I could verify; the only programmatic surface I found on a Starbucks subdomain is an ArcGIS Sharing REST API at geo-analytics.starbucks.com, which uses ArcGIS portal tokens.

surfaces.name: Starbucks Geo Analytics ArcGIS Sharing REST API
